text.message: I am not sure why you did not prioritise the ore port blue
just wanted you to plow me first
sorry, I gave you some cards for that tho
yeah, I know that was likely going to happen
I have brick for you blue
sorry, did not wanna give red insurance
it did not matter anyway, now that he dodged a 7
I can also trade wood here Oj
sorry, I should have robbed red
I actually thought I would mono later
he has 1 non knight at least
if you are taking road, then it is red
red had no cards, so I didn't use my knight
I think Oj now extends and retains road
I cannot take back road with 2 cards
if you extend, extend towards black
Oj is looking for settle now
